task: top-K recommendation for sparse users and items
input: user-item interaction graph with node sparsity labels (dense/sparse quadrants)
output: ranked list of items per user
backbone: Heterogeneous Graph Neural Network with Domain Adaptation and Enrichment Networks
key_idea: discover high-quality latent neighbors for sparse nodes by categorizing interactions into four quadrants and transferring knowledge from dense to sparse quadrants
datasets: three benchmark datasets (not named in abstract)
